questionHtml: Suggest one improvement to the use of Euler’s method which might increase the accuracy of the prediction of the model.
markschemeHtml:
Use a smaller step length                    R1

OR

Use a better method such as Runge-Kutta                    R1

OR

(Try to) solve the equation exactly                    R1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Suggest one improvement to the use of Euler’s method which might increase the accuracy of the prediction of the model.
